# Artofmany

> Artofmany is an interdisciplinary creative studio founded by Jofre Sanfeliu, with offices in Barcelona and Dubai. The site is a portfolio of brand direction, campaigns, exhibitions, editorial, and film work.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://artofmany.com/): Project grid with filtering by category (Public, Private, Brand Direction, Campaigns, Exhibitions, Editorial, Films, Lab, Archive).
- [About](https://artofmany.com/about): Studio bio and office contacts in Barcelona and Dubai.
- [Team](https://artofmany.com/team): The people behind Artofmany.

## More

- [Sitemap](https://artofmany.com/sitemap-index.xml): Full list of individual project pages.
